utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items are present. Each one is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) – yes; travel_dates (specific dates given) – yes; transportation (flight details and cost) – yes; accommodation (hotel name and cost) – yes; activities (list of activities with individual costs) – yes; additional_services (listed with costs) – yes; total_budget (complete cost shown) – yes. Therefore all required items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation via 'BudgetWings, economy class' (which maps to budget_airlines economy class), accommodation 'Backpacker's Base', activities include 'City Walking Tour', 'Museum Day Pass', and three hiking-related entries — 'Cycling Adventure', 'Night City Tour', and 'Craft Beer Tasting' — each embedded within 'Hiking Expedition' labels. The additional services (restaurants) include 'Italian Trattoria', 'Vegan Bistro', 'Sushi Bar', 'French Café', and 'Gourmet Burger Spot'. Ratings are mapped using the ground-truth dictionary.
